heading: Step 2: Upload the PDF to an Amazon  bucket.
body:
- Follow the steps to [create an S3 Bucket](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/creating-bucket.html).
  Ensure that you use a descriptive **Bucket Name**.

- Follow the steps to [upload a file to your Bucket](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/uploading-an-object-bucket.html).
  Select the file that contains the PDF that you just downloaded.
